text: What if I told you your actions are being shaped without you knowing? This is operant conditioning, where actions followed by rewards become more likely. Think about it—every time you get a compliment or a treat, you’re encouraged to repeat that behavior. Studies show this can apply to everything from training pets to improving workplace performance. Understanding this can help you change habits. Want to learn how? Hit follow for more insights into psychology and how to harness the power of rewards!
